frame_note: Enforcement and restriction are federal admin ledger lines; receiver episodic costs are local shock lines — neither substitutes for education-cell lifetime NPV but both shift incidence across layers.

parameter_claims.value_text: CBP FY2025 budget justification — border/entry enforcement spend vector
parameter_claims.notes: Admin cost not in NAS immigrant NPV; restriction counterfactual must book enforcement
Marginal deportation cost absent from lifetime NAS tables
Legal path conditions education/age at arrival — restriction changes mix not just level
Episodic local shock — restriction reduces inflow but sunk costs remain
~$190/diem cited in notes — episodic not smooth NPV

parameter_claims.value_text: CBO surge analysis implies reversing inflow affects GDP, revenue, productivity — restriction has fiscal cost on federal layer
parameter_claims.notes: Restriction counterfactual is not free even if local costs fall

parameter_claims.value_text: Border enforcement changes Mexican immigrant skill/legal composition
parameter_claims.notes: Restriction alters cell weights — not just aggregate count

generators.name: Enforcement admin ledger
generators.prompt: Sum CBP+ICE requested budgets (FY25–26 PDFs). Express per estimated unauthorized person (Pew stock). Compare to ITEP tax per unauthorized — is enforcement spend rival to tax paid?
generators.retrodiction: Would have added missing admin ℓ layer before restriction advocacy used only NAS lifetime negatives.
generators.negative_space: Restriction costless aside from lost immigrant fiscal surplus.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Budget request equals marginal enforcement cost
All CBP/ICE spend attributable to unauthorized population

generators.name: Receiver episodic vs federal annual dominance
generators.prompt: For surge cohort size N (~437k Mexico <HS adults): compute N × avg_federal_net annual vs sum(receiver_city total_spending) for FY2023-24. Which layer dominates for incidence storytelling?
generators.retrodiction: Would have shown NYC+Chicago episodic can rival federal proxy for surge narrative before scalar export.
generators.negative_space: Federal annual surplus settles city shelter bills.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Surge cohort concentrated in receiver cities

generators.name: Restriction changes cell not scalar
generators.prompt: Simulate 20% reduction in `<HS` recent-arrival weight vs 20% reduction in high-skill LPR employment class (DHS xlsx). Re-weight NAS NPV cells — which restriction policy moves lifetime sign more?
generators.retrodiction: Would have connected Lozano-Lopez enforcement selection and DHS LPR mix to M5 composition before count-only restriction debate.
generators.negative_space: Restriction modeled as fewer identical immigrants.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: LPR class maps to education bucket
NAS cells apply to marginal restrictee

generators.name: CBO restriction macro offset
generators.prompt: From CBO 60569: extract GDP/revenue/deficit channels for surge. Invert sign for restriction counterfactual sketch — federal cost of lost workers vs local savings from reduced inflow. Label partial equilibrium.
generators.retrodiction: Would have required federal GDP/revenue loss line in restriction debates that only cite local shelter savings.
generators.negative_space: Local fiscal relief from restriction has no federal offset cost.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Surge productivity effects externalize to restriction
Macro elasticities apply to marginal policy change

theories_tested.theory: Receiver episodic exceeds Mexico federal annual proxy for surge scale
theories_tested.falsifier: Federal proxy larger — episodic cities not dominant nationally

theories_tested.theory: Enforcement budget rivals ITEP tax floor per unauthorized
theories_tested.prediction: cbp+ice budget / pew_stock ~ same order as 96700000000/pew_stock
theories_tested.duckdb_test: Manual until budget tables parsed — compare orders of magnitude
theories_tested.falsifier: Enforcement trivial vs tax paid — admin layer secondary

theories_tested.theory: Restriction lowers `<HS` cell weight more than total count
theories_tested.duckdb_test: Qualitative — crosswalk LPR employment class to education_bucket over time
theories_tested.falsifier: Composition stable under enforcement — count-only model sufficient
